Synopsis: Revises "New Jersey Transportation Trust Fund Authority Act"; establishes State Transportation Infrastructure Bank within NJ Environmental Infrastructure Trust; renames NJ Environmental Infrastructure Trust.
Revises and renames NJSTARS; repeals NJSTARS II; establishes NJ HonorScholars Program.
Renames "county vocational school districts" as "county career academies."
Renames Mountainview Youth Correctional Facility as "William H. Fauver Youth Correctional Facility."
Establishes new crime of strict liability vehicular homicide; renames existing vehicular homicide as reckless vehicular homicide; designated as Ralph and David's Law.
Makes various revisions to "Uniform Fraudulent Transfer Act"; renames act to "Uniform Voidable Transactions Act."
Revises and renames NJSTARS; repeals NJSTARS II; establishes NJ HonorScholars Program.
Renames "county vocational school districts" as "county career academies."

Revises "New Jersey Transportation Trust Fund Authority Act"; establishes State Transportation Infrastructure Bank within NJ Environmental Infrastructure Trust; renames NJ Environmental Infrastructure Trust.
Establishes new crime of strict liability vehicular homicide; renames existing vehicular homicide as reckless vehicular homicide; designated as Ralph and David's Law.
